guide.title: SalesCast User Guide
guide.intro: Simply upload your sales data and our AI will forecast future sales and demand. No technical expertise required.

steps.title: Prepare your data
steps.body: Prepare data containing dates and sales amounts. You can copy directly from Excel or Google Sheets.

steps.title: Enter your data
steps.body: Select the "Upload CSV" or "Paste Data" tab. If copying from Excel, the Paste tab works great.

steps.title: Set the forecast period
steps.body: Use the slider to choose how many days to forecast. You can set anywhere from 7 to 180 days.

steps.title: Run the forecast
steps.body: Press the "Run Forecast" button. A chart and forecast table will appear within seconds.

steps.title: Review your results
steps.body: The chart shows actual vs. forecast trends. The table shows daily forecast values with 95% confidence intervals.

guide.csvDesc: Both UTF-8 and Shift-JIS encodings are supported. Column names are auto-detected.
guide.pasteDesc: Paste directly from Excel or Google Sheets.
guide.minDataDesc: At least 10 rows are required. We recommend 90+ days for best accuracy.

faqs.q: Is my data stored on the server?
faqs.a: Not by default. Data is discarded immediately after forecasting. Only if you check "Help improve accuracy" will your data be saved — anonymized.

faqs.q: How much data do I need?
faqs.a: A minimum of 10 rows is required, but 90+ days is recommended for better accuracy.
Accuracy depends on the regularity of your data. Data with clear seasonal or weekly patterns tends to forecast more accurately.

faqs.q: Can I forecast things other than sales?
faqs.a: Yes. Anything with a date and numeric value — visitor counts, orders, page views — can be forecasted.
Yes, it is completely free at this time.

usecases.title: Use Cases by Industry
usecases.intro: SalesCast works for any business with sales data — restaurants, e-commerce, retail, and more. No expertise needed.
usecases.ctaDesc: Free, no sign-up required. Just upload a CSV and forecasting begins.

cases.title: Use case: Restaurants
cases.description: Enter your daily sales data to forecast next week's or next month's revenue. Optimize ingredient orders and staff scheduling based on demand.
benefits: Automatically learns daily and seasonal sales patterns
Anticipate busy periods like holidays in advance
Reduce food waste and improve cost ratios
Optimize staff scheduling to match demand
cases.dataExample: Daily POS sales data (CSV export from your POS system)

cases.title: Use case: E-commerce
cases.description: Analyze order and sales time series to prevent stockouts and overstock. Forecasts account for demand shifts around sales and campaigns.
benefits: Maintain optimal stock levels based on demand forecasts
Understand demand shifts before and after sales events
cases.dataExample: Sales CSV from Shopify, WooCommerce, Amazon, etc.

cases.title: Use case: Retail & Supermarkets
cases.description: Analyze sales by product category and location to improve order accuracy. The model learns seasonal and weather-driven demand shifts.
benefits: Improve order accuracy with category-level forecasts
Optimize timing of seasonal product purchases
Cut costs from excess inventory disposal
cases.dataExample: Daily POS data by product or category

privacy.title: Privacy Policy & Terms of Service
privacy.pp1Body:
"{{service}}" is an AI sales and demand forecasting service operated by an individual.
Service URL: {{url}}
privacy.pp2Body: The service may collect the following information:
pp2Items: Contents of uploaded CSV files (date and numeric data)
Access logs (IP address, browser info, access timestamp)
Cookie data collected by Google AdSense for ad delivery
pp3PrincipleItems: Forecasting runs in real time on the server; data is not stored by default.
Uploaded data is discarded immediately after forecasting is complete.
privacy.pp3OptInIntro: Only when you check "Help improve accuracy" will your data be saved, after the following anonymization steps:
pp3OptInItems: Dates are shifted by a random offset (±180 days) to prevent identification of the actual time period
Sales values are normalized to a 0–1 scale to remove absolute amounts
Files are stored under random IDs with no information linking them to any user
Anonymized data is used solely for model improvement and is never shared or sold to third parties
privacy.pp4Body: This service uses Google AdSense to display ads. You can disable personalized ads by disabling cookies. See Google's Privacy Policy for details.
privacy.pp5Body: Analytics tools may be used to improve the service. Data collected is anonymous and does not identify individuals.
privacy.pp6Body: We do not share collected information with third parties except as required by law, to protect life or property, or with user consent.
privacy.pp7Body: This policy may be updated without notice. Changes will be posted on the service.
privacy.tos1Body: These Terms govern use of "{{service}}". By using the service, you agree to these Terms.
tos2Items: Any act violating laws or public order
Unauthorized access or hacking of the service
Infringing the rights of other users or third parties
Interfering with the operation of the service
Sending large volumes of requests for commercial purposes
privacy.tos3Body: Forecast results are statistical estimates from an AI model and do not guarantee actual sales or demand. The service is not liable for any losses arising from decisions based on forecast results.
privacy.tos4Body: All intellectual property rights in the service's systems, design, and content belong to the operator.
privacy.tos5Body: The operator may change, suspend, or terminate the service without prior notice.
privacy.tos6Body: These Terms are governed by the laws of Japan. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the court having jurisdiction over the operator's location.
